design_notes.subject: Five DCS-profile keycap cross-sections in a horizontal row
profile_traits_encoded: Uniform height across all five caps (230px on 750px canvas) — the primary DCS identifier
Cylindrical top scoop: elliptical arc from corner to corner, dipping 28px at center
Trapezoidal silhouette: sides taper 12px inward per side from base to top
Legend slots: two horizontal olive (#6B7A5E) inset rects in the upper third
composition: Uniform-height bracket on left edge: two horizontal ticks connected by vertical arm
Focal ellipse wash beneath center cap in ochre
Bronze theme dot at upper-right: #BFA67A circle r=10
Two olive accent dots flanking the theme dot
Faint inter-cap seam lines suggest row continuity
Baseline tick marks at each cap center
